contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Credential vault — fix launchd+iCloud rename/unlink quirk; verified end-to-end
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/251
  
  Details:
  Gary planted his real passphrase, ran first backup, loaded the launchd agent, then ran the 'touch a credential file to verify WatchPaths fires' test. The trigger fired correctly — but the script failed at mv $TMP $OUT with 'Operation not permitted'. Root cause: macOS Sonoma sandboxes launchd-spawned processes from rename/unlink ops inside iCloud Drive unless /bin/bash has Full Disk Access. The encrypted .tmp file was created fine; only the mv (and cleanup rm) were denied.
  
  Code-side fix (no FDA grant required):
  - backup.sh writes encrypted output DIRECTLY to OUT (no .tmp + mv pattern).
  - Replaced symlink-based latest pointer with a plain text credentials-latest.txt (CREATE works under launchd; symlink update requires unlink which doesn't).
  - Retention rm wrapped in try-catch — logs warning instead of failing the run.
  
  restore.sh updated with 3-way resolver: credentials-latest.txt (new) → credentials-latest.age symlink (legacy) → newest by mtime.
  
  README updated to document the Sonoma quirk + two operator-side options: manual prune via terminal (recommended) OR grant /bin/bash FDA.
  
  Verified end-to-end under launchd post-fix: WatchPaths fire on .env touch → new snapshot written in <1s → credentials-latest.txt updates → restore.sh --dry-run picks up newest via text pointer → 268 archive entries listed → exit 0 → debounce correctly skips re-fires within 60s.
  
  Note: these post-V1 patches went directly to main on the brand-new credential_vault repo (no PR flow used yet on a fresh single-operator repo). Commits: 990e3b2 (launchd fix), ac84630 (README quirk doc). Will use PR flow going forward.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
